name: Kathy Rain
short_description: Set in the '90s, Kathy Rain tells the story of a strong-willed journalism major who has to come to terms with her troubled past as she investigates the mysterious death of her recently deceased grandfather.
detailed_description:
Set in the '90s, Kathy Rain tells the story of a strong-willed journalism major who has to come to terms with her own troubled past as she investigates the mysterious death of her recently deceased grandfather. Armed with her motorcycle, a pack of cigs, and a notepad, Kathy begins to delve into a local mystery surrounding her hometown that will take her on a harrowing journey full of emotional and personal turmoil.

As she follows a trail of clues he left behind, questions emerge… What was Joseph Rain really looking for that night all those years ago? What turned him into a mere shell of a man, confined to a wheelchair? What secret did a suicidal young artist take with her to the grave, and why are so many people in Conwell Springs going mad? The truth is dark and sinister…

  • 320x240 (4:3) resolution with crisp pixel art graphics
  • 4,000+ lines of dialogue
  • Full English voice acting directed by Wadjet Eye Games' Dave Gilbert
  • Original soundtrack
  • 40+ hand-drawn environments
  • Compelling narrative with eerie plot set in the '90s

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Polish
*languages with full audio support

reviews.review_text:
Great story, great voice acting, and very weird conclusion. I don't want to spoil too much. It is a truly worthy experience.



[quote]Follow us for more [url=https://store.steampowered.com/curator/45113328-Awesome-Adventure-Friends/] Awesome Adventure[/url] [/quote]

A great detective adventure game with a captivating story that has you at the edge of your seat. The puzzles are designed in a way so you can understand what to do in order to solve them and get clues throughout the game. I got it on sale for $1 and I think it was worth it! Fun play! I'm curious to check out the second game now.

It was such a fun point and click game however my dumbss played this version instead of DC so Im going to have to play the newer version as well to see if there is a better ending and if the story makes more sense? Kathy is such a gem! The puzzles are quite easy and the humor is immaculate.
What can I say? I love a good point-and-click detective game... this hits all the sweet spots.
Good point n click, voice acting, script, art, sound.
